chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 314 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «قُصَّهَا إِذَا طَالَتْ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.314 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: " Trim it when it grows long."
